He meets her again when he travels to his hometown in a bus. He impresses her at first with his nature but things go south when he accidentally kisses her while trying to take a selfie with her. She complains to her brother, Phaneendra, on phone and Govind runs out of bus. They meet again when his sister gets engaged to Phaneendra. Govind requests Geetha not to reveal about him while Phaneendra keeps searching for the guy who kissed her on the bus. The misunderstanding between the couple grows as they travel together for marriage shopping and invitations. As Geetha learns his true nature and falls for him, he starts to avoid her as she doesn't treat him well. Before Govind realizes his mistake, Geetha's marriage is fixed with someone else and he has to win her back before they get separated forever.

title: Godarollu - The People of Godavari
synopsis: This Short Film shows us about the life of a guy named Ramudu, who was born in Godavari Districts of Andhra Pradesh, India. Different phases in his life (Young, Married and Old) are shown in which he tells his unforgettable memories and eternal love towards his birth place godavari and to the people of Godavari.

title: Idi Naa Love Story
synopsis: Abhiram is an ad filmmaker and his sister sets him on a trip to Araku Valley with an expectation of hooking him up with her fiance's sister Sruthi. She lives in Araku Valley and Abhi comes there with her sister's words. He meets Abhinaya and he falls for her as they share their past love stories with each other when they both are together. They are happy in love but the expectations of Abhiram on his girlfriend are not met by her, he disappoints. What happens next is crux of the story.

title: Juvva
synopsis: Basavaraju is an arrogant rich kid who obsessed with his schoolmate Shruthi for which he kills his school principal and is sent to jail. After which Shruthi's parents change her identity and shift her to Hyderabad. There, she gets close to an easy going guy named Rana. When everything seems to be going well in their life, Basavaraju returns from Jail and starts looking for Shruthi.

title: Kastaalu
synopsis: This Shortfilm shows the struggles of short film makers such as less locations, Immatured actors, Low Budget etc.., Rajesh in order to woo his crush Harshitha, takes the help of his friends Raghu and Arun to make a short film of his love story. But the tables turn on him unexpectedly in the end.

title: K.G.F: Chapter 1
synopsis: The movie dates back to 1951. Here, two incidents take place; The birth of the hero and other in the Kolar Gold Fields (K.G.F) they get gold. The hero is brought up in poverty. When he is very young itself he goes to Mumbai to become a mafia don. His mother's wish was to see her son rich and powerful. After being in Mumbai for some time he returns back. Will he be able to become a Don? Will he set his people free from the age old slavery? Forms the plot of the movie?
language: Kannada, Chinese, Japanese, Tamil, Telugu, Hindi, Malayalam, English, Korean

title: Kirrak Party
synopsis: Krishna a first year student meets Meera a second year student and daughter of a police officer. Everyone in the campus likes Meera and even Krishna's friend. But Meera gets close to Krishna and they both become good friends. Meera is a writer of a book about sex worker's life and she knows the sex worker personally. The sex worker is pregnant and one day she gets labour pain. Meera along with Krishna takes her to the hospital. The sex worker bears a baby girl and keeps the baby's name as Meera. Krishna holds the baby and gets emotional. Meera always saw Krishna as a fun, loving and cheerful guy. Seeing Krishna as innocent and emotional Meera suggests Krishna to discover his second half.

title: Laasika series - Stereo
synopsis: Medha, a renowned Kuchipudi dancer comes to perform a stage show in a village on request of one of her fans. Her father is rude towards her actions and discourages her because of social influence. Rest of the drama deals with how Medha handled the situation. 'Stereo' is a take on stereo types in this society.

title: Lets Go
synopsis: Riya is an solo travellar she was most affectionate with her dad she is willing to fullfill her dad dream but one day she met a boy on her journey actually she is not having a destination to travel she is a free bird and dosen't want to involve in any releationship except her father.. then what happend after met with a unknown guy in her journey .. what happend in her life ..is she accept his love or not.

title: Maata Rani Mounamidhi
synopsis: This Short videos revolves around an introvert guy named Rajesh who is trying to woo his crush from many days, but failing to do so everytime. He takes his best friend Arun's help in learning some techniques about how to talk to girls and flirt with girls. Rajesh finally tries them on his crush and it turns out to be an yet another hilarious failure for him.

title: Mahanati
synopsis: Mahanati depicts the personal and professional life of first Indian female superstar, Savitri. After actress Savitri is admitted in a hospital in Bangalore and she goes into coma, a young investigative journalist, Madhuravani, seizes the opportunity to write an article on her life. The young Savitri meets Gemini Ganesan, who works in casting department, after her failed attempts to get a role in cinema. They both start a career in acting and eventually rise to stardom. Savitri falls in love with him despite the fact that he is married. Their marriage results in a rift with her family but Savitri never gives up on her love. Her dreams are shattered when she learns that Gemini Ganesan is a womanizer and has been continuing his illicit relationships even after their marriage. The rest of the story is about how she stood up against all odds and the result of her wrong choices in life.

title: Manasainodu
synopsis: Sreemukhi (Priya Singh) decides to end her life after receiving a strange call. It is later learnt that it was a prank call by Arya (Manoj Nandan), who works for a TV channel. Arya and Sreemukhi turn out to be friends and decide to get married. After a series of events, misunderstandings arise between Arya and Sreemukhi. How they tackle the differences and unite forms the plot of Manasainodu.

title: Naa Peru Surya Naa Illu India
Nannu Dochukunduvate
synopsis: An ambitious software engineer, Karthik, has a dream of climbing up the corporate ladder and get a high paying job in USA. He stays away from family, sacrifices his social life and personal interests for his ambition. He employs a short film actress to act as his girlfriend, Siri, to avoid an arranged marriage. The quirky girl is more than he bargained for and impresses his father. Karthik too falls in love with her but as soon as he notices that he is drifting from his professional goals, he decides to avoid her. But when she returns to his life, he introspects his personal and professional choices in life.

title: Nartanasala
synopsis: Naga Shourya is a young man who always wants women to be independent in life. In this process, he solves a girl called Manasa's problems and falls in love during the course of time. Just when things seem to be going fine, his dad fixes his match with Satya. To avoid this tricky situation, Shourya reveals to Satya's family that he is a gay. Rest of the story is as to how Shourya manages his gay act and finally marries the one he loves.

title: Nee Venakale Nadichi
director: Bhanusree Teja, Abhas Shrivastava, Tarun Sharma, Anuj Shrivastava

title: Needhi Naadhi Oke Katha
synopsis: A middle-class youth raises his voice against the traditional, standardized system of education that does not take into account each student's skill and nor make them think.

title: Nota
synopsis: Vasudev "Nasser", the chief minister of Telangana state, is a hero turned politician. He makes son Mr. Varun "Vijay Deverakonda" as proxy CM on the advice of a Swami Ji. After Vasudev goes to jail on corruption charges, the responsibility of running the state remains with Varun who is a novice in politics. Rest of the story is all about the hurdles Varun encounters as CM.

title: Pedavi Datani Matokatundhi
synopsis: Tarun is a stud and a famous musician during high school days, but arrogant and rude to his classmates except to his best friend, Abhay (Moin). He rejects and insults love proposals of many girls, including Ahaana's (Payal Wadhwa). Sai (Maurice Sadiche), another classmate of his, seeks to join Tarun's music band but gets bullied by Tarun and Abhay in front of the class. Few years later, Tarun is a college dropout and works as Janitor with Abhay as an accountant, both in the same company with Sai, as their boss. Sai constantly insults Tarun at the workplace, to take revenge of the embarrassing high school incident. Tarun falls in love with same Ahaana, the girl who he rejected and insulted during school days. Ahaana is now a beautiful, independent girl who refuses to forgive Tarun for what he did to her. Tarun claims himself to be a loser with all the problems. His father (V.K.Naresh), who works in CCTV agency, constantly scolds him and motivates him at the same time. One day, Tarun accidentally falls into a cupid curse. He has to complete a task of matching three couples within 48 hours or he can never tell Ahaana that he loves her or for that matter, get any kind of love life again. Tarun is on chase to complete the task and save himself from the curse, with the help of his cupid associate Bunty (Nandu Kumar). He manages to complete the task, comes out of the curse and makes Ahaana fall in love with him.

title: Prema Entha Madhuram
synopsis: Roshan is an NRI who returns back to India to meet his girlfriend Priya whose marriage has been decided during their childhood days. Prem accidentally meets Priya and falls in love with her. Roshan who wasn't aware about Prem's love, suggests tips to Prem on how to impress his girlfriend. After both of them had proposed Priya, she enters into disoriented state until a solution is found.

title: Raa Raa
synopsis: Raj Kiran (Sreekanth) is a film director, who is the son of a very successful filmmaker played by Giri Babu. Raj Kiran decides to follow his father's footsteps but all his films end up as disasters. Finally, his father invests his entire savings in one of his directorial ventures and dies of a heart break when that film flops as well. His mother is hospitalised as well and the doctor says that she will recover only if Raj Kiran makes a successful film. A producer comes forward to make a horror film with him on the condition that he directs it entirely in a desolate bungalow in a forest on the outskirts of the city. What they are not prepared for is the actual presence of ghosts in the bungalow. Will Raj Kiran and his team make it out of the bungalow? Does he realise his dream of making a successful film?

title: Rachayitha
synopsis: Aditya Varma's love for Padmavati makes him want to give her a new life as she is desolated but she starts to behave in a strange manner. What happens next, forms the crux.

title: Rajaratha
synopsis: It's a story of a Bus traveling from Rigalore(an imaginary place in malnad region of karnataka) to Chennai via Bengaluru. The journey has the hero and heroine occupying it and well accompanied by fellow passengers. The love between the hero and heroine starts blossoming with the present happenings and the memories of past with a few hiccups in the journey. There's another dimension to the story which takes shape after about 70% of the movie and that can only be watched in the theatre. Overall it's a proper romantic comedy movie which looks very fresh with a additional message.

title: Rajugadu
synopsis: Raj Tharun has a serious problem; he is a kleptomaniac. He can't stop himself from stealing small things. Even when he falls in love with the beautiful Amyra Dastur, he couldn't restrain himself from stealing. That creates a huge problem for his love life as Amyra's father hates criminals. Will Raj finally be able to get rid his kleptomania and win Amyra over?

title: Rangasthalam
synopsis: The film is set in 1980's rural India. Chittibabu, a pure and innocent guy with partial deafness, earns his livelihood by supplying water to agricultural lands in the fictional village of Rangasthalam. The crux of the story forms when his brother decides to contest against the President who had been ruling the village for 30 years by usurping the lands of the innocent villagers. Chittibabu, on the other hand, is only concerned for his brother's safety and will go to great lengths to safeguard his life.

title: Rangula Raatnam
synopsis: Vishnu is a happy go software engineer sharing a very close bond with his mom. She even suggests him to love a girl. With this, as time passes, he falls in love with Keerthi. After this, some twists arise and how Vishnu manages to solve all the problems forms the rest of the story.

title: Rx 100
synopsis: Shiva (Kartikeya) is a village youth who falls for a city bred girl Indu (Payal). As a passionate romance brews, Shiva falls madly in love with her, but things don't turn out as expected. Indu got married to someone else and departs to USA ,but Shiva waits 3 years for her in mad hope of uniting with her. She returns to their village one day, but does Shiva get her back?

title: Sailaja Reddy Alludu
synopsis: The son of an egoistic businessman, Chaitu, is a cool-headed youngster who doesn't worry much about the problems and finds easy solutions. He falls in love with an egoistic girl, Anu, and she reciprocates his love after several funny attempts to impress her. The things get complex when his egoistic father announces their marriage without the consent of Anu's mother, Sailaja Reddy. Chaitu decides to convince Sailaja Reddy without hurting anyone's ego.

title: Sarabha
synopsis: Sharabha movie is a Socio-Fantasy and Action Thriller directed by N Narasimha Rao and produced by Ashwani Kumar Sehdev while Koti scored music for this movie. Aakash Kumar and Mishti are in the main lead roles along with Jaya Prada, Napoleon, Puneet Issar, Charandeep, L B Sriram, Avinash, Tanikella Bharani are seen in supporting roles in this movie. It is an Epic Fight between Good and Evil - God and Devil.

title: Savyasachi
synopsis: Vikram Aditya is a guy who suffers from alien hand syndrome where the left hand does not be in his control most of the time. On the other hand, Vikram falls in love with Chitra(Niddhi Agarwal) and when things seem to be going absolutely fine, his life turns upside down as his brother in law gets killed and his niece gets kidnapped. Rest of the story is as to how Vikram saves his niece and where does Madhavan feature in this entire setup.

title: Silly Fellows
synopsis: Veerababu "Allari Naresh" is a little time tailor who gets his closest companion Suri Babu "Sunil" wedded to a nearby dancer "Nandini" just to awe his MLA(Jayaprakash Reddy). This is likewise the time when Posani and his posse discover that the MLA has every one of the insights about a whole of 500 crores.

title: Srinivasa Kalyanam
synopsis: Vasu "Nithin" is a well-educated youth who belongs to a joint family. He falls in love with Sri(Raashi Khanna) and confronts her father "Prakash Raj" about his love. On the other hand, Sri's father is a rich businessman who does not believe in old-school formalities of marriage and traditions. Rest of the story is as to how Vasu takes things into his hands and makes his wedding happen on a traditional note by changing Sri's father's mindset.

title: Stranger: On the bench
synopsis: One fine morning two strangers meet and have a chat over girlfriends, the antagonist is a womanizer whilst protagonist has a unique perspective at things. Over the conversation protagonist induces his perspective on antagonist while the tea vendor is noticing all of it.

title: Subedar Joginder Singh
synopsis: It is a biographical feature film on India's Highest Wartime Gallantry Award - Param Vir Chakra winner Subedar Joginder Singh. He fought three wars (as per records) for India before achieving martyrdom in the Sino-Indian War of 1962 while commanding a platoon in North Eastern Frontier Agency (NEFA) (Now Arunachal Pradesh). The story portrays his character and motivation in the scene of battle.

title: Swapnam
synopsis: Swapnam is a coming of age drama featuring the struggles of four young adults in pursuit of their dreams and happiness. Do you choose dreams or do dreams choose you? What lengths would you go to follow your dreams? Take a flight of fancy with us to see if dreams do come true.

title: Tholi Prema
synopsis: The story follows the life of a guy called Aditya who didn't have anything to look forward to in life until Varsha came along. A classic case of love at first sight but it was short lived as she exited the scene only to return later. But from the looks of it, it's not going to be an easy love story as they have to face hurdles on the way. The film's underlining tagline is - Memories, whether good or bad stay with us always.

title: Touch Chesi Chudu
synopsis: A peaceful man completely devoted to his family finds his violent past resurfacing.

title: Tumbbad
director: Rahi Anil Barve, Anand Gandhi, Adesh Prasad

title: Vijetha
synopsis: Srinivasa Rao (Murli Sharma) does his best to give his children everything they seek and fulfil even the smallest of their desires. His son Ram (Kalyaan Dhev) grows up oblivious to all the sacrifices his father had to make to give him the life he has. Will he ever change and will his father ever find the chance to fulfil his own dreams forms the story.

title: Vishwaroopam 2
synopsis: The Dirty Bomb planned attack on New York City by Al-Quada terrorist Omar Qureshi was destroyed by an Indian Intelligence Bureau Agent, Wisam through investigation. While Omar and Salim have escaped from New York to India, Wisam was given the responsibility to kill Omar along with his co-terrorists. In the process, Wisam's past comes into fruition.

title: Voo Pe Ku Ha Voollo Pelliki Kukkala Hadavidi
Ye Mantram Vesave
synopsis: A youngster, who is obsessed with gadgets, plays a game to pick up women. However, as the game progresses, things go awry when a woman's life is in danger.

title: 1st Rank Raju
synopsis: A studious and obedient youngster follows his father's advice and memories all his study material to achieve the first rank in his academic career, but will he be equipped to succeed in the real world as well?

title: 2 Hours Love
synopsis: Story of a couple in a contractual relationship where they meet only for 2 hours a day and behave like strangers during other times.

title: 4 Letters
synopsis: A love triangle which revolves around a rich engineering student, Ajay, a violinist Anjali, whose strict mother despises rich people, and a sexy fashion designing student Anupama. What follows is a saga of lust and love among these three individuals.

title: 90 ML
synopsis: Devadas(Kartikeya) an MBA gold medalist falls in love with Suvasana (Neha Solanki) a physiotherapist. How Devadas faced heroine and her family (Who're anti alcoholic) after they get to know he's Alcoholic? How he convinced Suvasana's father? Meanwhile How Devadas got clash with Jhonwik (Ravikishan) a comic psycho villain is the rest of the story.

Goutam(Kalyan Ram) a media journalist frequently gets a dream on a missing girl (Nivetha Tomas). In the process of tracing out the whereabouts the girl in his dream, Goutam finds out that she is Aadya. Who is Aadya? Is she really missing in the real world too? If so who are the culprits behind her missing story? How will Goutam solve the suspense puzzle in the story?

title: 1947 Two Soldiers
synopsis: During the India Pakistan First War, Indian soldiers were outnumbered and left with 2 Soldiers (Mohan and Kishore) against Pakistan Tribal Militia at Baramulla forest, Mohan will be shot dead, Kishore survives this Battle. Later, Kishore meets Parvathi as per Mohan's wish.

title: Aaviri
synopsis: After losing their first child in an accident, a couple moves to a palatial home, where their young daughter comes under the spell of an eerie spirit.

title: ABCD: American-Born Confused Desi
synopsis: Aravind aka Avi (Allu Sirish) and his cousin Bala Shanmugam aka Basha (Master Bharat) are NRIs who love to live their life king size. What happens when the former's father (Naga Babu) decides to teach them a lesson in responsibility?

title: Agent Fluke: By Xfs Reels
synopsis: An overconfident detective must get hold of an intelligent smuggler making sure that everything is right along the way

title: Agent Sai Srinivasa Athreya
synopsis: Agent Athreya (Navin Polisetty) starts a detective agency in Nellore (a city) named FBI (Fathima Bureau of Investigation) and covers small cases. The silliness and façade continue until Athreya lands in trouble when he seriously pursues a dead found on the rails. How Athreya untangles the mystery is what the film is all about.

title: Ajay Passayyadu
synopsis: Ajay is a happy-go-lucky spoil brat. Ajay gets into rivalry with Vikram who is his opponent in college. Ajay falls for Vikram's sister, Nandini, who reciprocates his love. Misunderstandings lead Nandini to hate Ajay. How Ajay wins Nandini and convinces both the families forms the plot of Ajay Passayyadu

title: Akkadokaduntadu
synopsis: Movie is about five friends who try to get out of a hit and run case. They decide to bribe an eye witness by looting the black money of a reputed politician. Abruptly this becomes a challenge for them how to escape from the case.

title: Alternate Ending
synopsis: the story is based on honor killing of a young couple who want to come back home As they have given up their love marriage which happened against their parents wishes.

title: Amma Rajyamlo Kadapa Biddalu
synopsis: Andhra Pradesh faces turmoil as elections roll around the corner,various political leaders fight against each other and vie for the CM seat.

title: Anaganaga Oka Nanna
synopsis: A little girl is writing a story of a great father with her perspective on how little changes in attitude can make a huge difference.

title: And the Oskar Goes To..
synopsis: A real touching story of a movie maker who struggle to make his own movie passionately and sacrifice his life for his debut Movie, A must watch and inspiring narration.

title: Anthargatha
synopsis: Revolves around a young couple Vassu (30) and Vrushaali (27) who always wanted to adopt a child instead of having their own child. Vrushaali who is a gynaec once comes across Krishna (18), her patient who is a young, bold, witty woman who deals with an unwanted pregnancy. The twist in the plot arises when the couple decided to adopt Krishna's child but want to hide this fact from their own family and especially from the society. But what made the young couple take this step? How do they manage to hide the truth from society?

title: Arjun Suravaram
synopsis: An investigative journalist is arrested for cheating banks with fake certificates. He discovers a crime syndicate behind the scam and decides to investigate it himself.

title: ASHWAMEDHAM
synopsis: How do you defeat an opponent in a game of chess if he claims to read your mind and know your next move? In a world where no one is who they appear to be, Dhruva is an ordinary man who runs a chain of cyber cafés'. Or so it appears. What lies hidden about him is that he is an undercover agent working for the government in the anti-insurgency/terrorism prevention wing of RAW. When CBI gets information that an unprecedented attack on the digital economy of the country is being planned by a group of hackers in an attempt to cripple the country's economy and take it, hostage, then to keep matters under wraps, the covert wing is activated. Aditya is one of the covert agents. During his investigation and attempts to sabotage the hacking plans, his opponents seem to be always outguessing his next move. To make matters worse, in the game of chess he is playing with an elderly gentleman (who claims to be a mere tailor), he is losing every single game. And the gentleman explains that perhaps he is able to read Aditya's mind and know his next move; which may be why Aditya is unable to defeat him. How then, does our hero win the game of chess and out-wit the hackers? And how are these two tasks related? What big deception lies in store behind the game of the clash of minds and guts? And will he be able to protect his loved ones, the woman of his life and the apple of his eye, his eight-year-old niece? And who is this mysterious man who claims to be able to read minds? Can he really read minds, or is there a deeper reason behind his ability to win every game?

title: Auto Raju
synopsis: A day in the life of Auto Raju.

title: Bailampudi
synopsis: Ravi (Harish Vinay), an auto driver falls for Kalyani (Tanishq Rajan) who happens to be the daughter of the village head Guru Narayan( Brahmanandareddy). The twist in the tale arises when Guru Narayan gets killed by Ravi. During his last breath, he reveals a secret about Kalyani which leaves Ravi stunned.

title: Beach Road Chetan
director: Chetan Maddineni, Chakravarty Devulapalli, Eswar Surapu
synopsis: When a happy-go-lucky kind of a guy chances upon a mysterious iPhone, his life turns topsy-turvy to unexpected consequences.

title: Bhagyanagara Veedullo Gamattu
synopsis: Srinu (Srinivasa Reddy), Jojo (Satya) and Peter (Shakalaka Shankar) are best friends and aspiring film makers. How do these three friends get trapped into drug mafia?

title: Bhoomi
synopsis: The story is about 'Bhoomi', a coming of age young woman, who leaves her family in search for freedom.

title: Bichagada Majaka
synopsis: Siddhu & Avani Fall In Love With Each Other But Their Love Story Does Not Go Well With Avani's Dad. Left With No Choice, He Lays A Weird Condition To Siddhu In Order To Marry His Daughter. What Is That Condition? Did Siddhu Fulfill It?

title: The Blood
synopsis: Exploitation of the proletariat by the capitalist bourgeoisie has been triggering factor for the greatest social revolutions across the globe, right from El Porfiriato in Mexico to the Great Proletarain Cultural Revolution in China. India is no stranger to revolutions. Social revolutionaries belonging to the extreme 'left' have played a significant role in keeping the flame of revolutionary change alive. The question that has plagued us generation after generation 'Is violence and killing for 'social revolution' justified? How is killing for revolution different from murder? This fiery turbulence that engulfs Anand when he is on a morally tasking mission is the core of the film 'Raktham' - The Blood. Rakhtam delves deep into the ideological and moral dilemma of murder and revolution portrayed by Anand, the main protagonist who is torn between his poetic heart and revolutionary mind when confronted with the passion to execute his task for a larger purpose and the politics surrounding the situation. Raktham gives its audience an insight into the mind of a Maoist. Like a great piece of art, the movie does not conclude or judge the protagonist's actions as right or wrong. On the contrary, they are left for the audience to decipher through Anand and his accomplices who play the devil's advocate, propelling and at times compelling the audience to reconsider its stance. Does Anand succeed in his task? Or does his humanness take over his rationality? 'Raktham'-The Blood, directed by multiple award winning Director Rajesh Touchriver and produced by eminent human rights activist Sunitha Krishnan is a bold statement on the perception of revolution and social change. The film revolves around incidents that has happened in India, but audience sitting anywhere in the world will be able to link the similarities to their country.

title: Boy
synopsis: A boy's story during the final days of his high school.

title: Brochevarevarura
synopsis: This is the story of 'R3 batch' consisting of Rocky, Rambo and Rahul, three friends who keep failing every year and are stuck with studying inter.

title: Burra Katha
synopsis: Abhi and Ram are two personalities in the same body whose lives get complicated when Abhi falls in love with Happy.

title: Caste
synopsis: This short film discusses the impact of the caste system on education in India. The video reveals how the reservation system has both provided assistance to those in need and led to criticism and questioning about its necessity. It also addresses the persistent presence of caste discrimination and violence in India and advocates for change. The Cast emphasizes the need to abolish castes and encourages individuals to not let their caste determine their status.

title: Caste
synopsis: This short film discusses the impact of the caste system on education in India. The video reveals how the reservation system has both provided assistance to those in need and led to criticism and questioning about its necessity. It also addresses the persistent presence of caste discrimination and violence in India and advocates for change. The Cast emphasizes the need to abolish castes and encourages individuals to not let their caste determine their status.

title: Chanakya
synopsis: Arjun aka Ramakrishna is a RAW marshall from Delhi who has a 100% success rate at nabbing terrorists. What happens when he makes enemies out of India's most wanted Ibrahim Qureshi and his son Sohail?

title: Chikati Gadilo Chithakotudu

title: Cigarette
synopsis: Cigarette is a perfect thriller film with complicated beast. Story runs on a pace, tension, a compelling plot and with characters to carry it off.

title: Cigarette Independent film
synopsis: Cigarette is a perfect thriller film with complicated beast. Story runs on a pace, tension, a compelling plot and with characters to carry it off.

title: Cinemawala
synopsis: It's about an orphan who aspires to become an actor in the film industry.

title: Cobra
synopsis: Ram Gopal Verma to make his acting debut with 'Cobra'.

title: Coffee & Sea
synopsis: Coffee and Sea juxtaposes two different facets of Loneliness. It portrays a day in the lives of two young men and metaphorically deals with their struggle with Loneliness and Depression.

title: Crazy Crazy Feeling
synopsis: A man tries to reunite with his ex-girlfriend after a petty argument ruins their relationship.

title: Dear Comrade
synopsis: A hot-blooded student union leader falls for a state-level cricketer but his anger management issues and violent streak threatens to derail their love story.

title: Devi 2
synopsis: A doting wife goes through a hard time trying to save her husband who is possessed by two spirits.

title: Dhairye Sahase
synopsis: Baby, a freelance investigation agent with special observation skills helps police crack the mysterious deaths of young men in India.

title: Dhrusti
synopsis: An injured home bound photographer watches a murder being committed, through his window and becomes the prime suspect in the case. How he unfolds the mystery forms the plot of the film.

title: Diksoochi
synopsis: A man sets out to solve the mystery surrounding a tragic incident that happened in 1975.

title: Dorasani
synopsis: Dorasani explores the periodic tale of love between a rich lady Devaki and a poor boy Raju.

title: Durmargudu
synopsis: Durmargudu is a action thriller movie directed by Suneeth Jampa and produced by Rajuvamsee. The movie cast includes Vijay Krishna, Firdous Banu, Zara khan are playing in the main lead roles while Chinni Krishna scored music.

title: Edaina Jaragochu
synopsis: Three close friends who are born on April 1 want to change their fate and become millionaires. When one of them gets a new job and falls in love, the trio decide to help her out by making easy money. But what happens when they end up in situations they did not perceive?

title: Ek
synopsis: EK is a love story set in the context of ever growing threat of suicide bombings in the country and across the world. It's a stylishly shot emotional action thriller with realistic treatment that is sure to strike a chord with the masses. It reveals how victims and others deeply attached to them will feel when loved ones become prey for the monstrous acts. Its characters represent different dimensions that dominate one's behavior and shows all our societal problems are emerging out of sick minds, Having had his share of troubles, hero feels that the treatment is necessary for such minds. This is the driving idea for the protagonist who takes on people behind such inhuman acts..What happens after that, is something you should wait and watch with your friend and family.

title: Evadu Thakkuva Kadu
synopsis: It follows the story of four friends who face the wrath of a powerful man after their actions inadvertently result in a loss of face for him. They must now fight back against him for survival.

title: Evaru
synopsis: Sub-inspector Vikram Vasudev is entrusted with the task of investigating the murder of a high ranking officer who was killed by his alleged rape victim. When he delves deeper into the case he uncovers some surprising facts.

title: Evvarikee Cheppoddu
synopsis: Hari and Harathi are in love, but Harathi's father won't agree to their relationship because of their caste differences.

title: F2: Fun and Frustration
synopsis: The film begins with Venky (Venkatesh) and Varun (Varun Tej) getting caught to police and interrogated by an officer Viswanath (Nassar), then Venky narrates his past, as his marriage made by a bureau with Harika (Tamannaah Bhatia). In the beginning, his marital life enjoyable but later on, Harika takes advantages over Venky and starts torturing him. To his misfortune, his life takes another loop when Harika's sister Honey (Mehreen Pirzada) enters into their house and creates more trouble. Now, Varun starts narrating his own story, he is a happy-go youth who loves Honey a lot helps her win cultural fest in her college. Here, Venky observes an incident of Varun and Honey hugging and then challenges with Harika's family that if he could prove Honey has a boyfriend, all of their family must become his slaves and somehow does it. But Harika's family manipulates and covers up that they already knew about it. Despite Venky's warnings, Varun moves on with marriage arrangements. After six days, a humorous incident takes place where Venky and Varun escape with Venky's neighbor Prasad Rajendra Prasad when Venky proves that he has two families and is not able to bear the torture of his two wives. Venky, Varun and Prasad leave to Europe. There they find that Harika and Honey have moved on and are getting married to other people as those two decided to teach Venky and Varun a lesson. The rest of the story is how Venky and Varun realize their mistakes and try and get their love back.

title: Falaknuma Das
synopsis: Set in the backdrop of the colonies of falaknuma where a group of youngsters fall into unexpected consequences which lead them to a driving pathway of violence, brutality and ruthlessness.

title: Gaddalakonda Ganesh
synopsis: An aspiring filmmaker who wants to direct a realistic story, stumbles upon a menacing villain and to learn the nitty-gritties of the villain's character, he puts his and his friend's life on the line.

title: Game Over
synopsis: A nyctophobic woman has to fight her inner demons to stay alive in the game called life.

title: Gang Leader
synopsis: A Bank Robbery of 300 Crores, 5 different age groups of women from girl child to old woman whom wants to seek-revenge, a revenge novel writer whose first original story starts with all of these and where these all leads to is what NANI'S GANGLEADER is all about.

title: Gangs Of Madras
synopsis: A woman who loses her husband in a police encounter plots to take revenge on the gangsters who had framed him.

title: George Reddy
synopsis: George Reddy is a biopic based on the life of a student leader, boxer and Gold medalist, who influenced the politics of Andhra Pradesh state in Osmania University between 1967 and 1972. He is often remembered for inspiring revolutionary thoughts until he was brutally murdered at his hostel in 1972.

title: Gor Jeevan
synopsis: Indian Telugu film directed by Kpn Chawhan.

title: Gorilla
synopsis: Three friends who need money to better their lives and a disillusioned farmer hatch a plan to rob a bank with a chimp as an accomplice.

title: Grey Town
synopsis: A plot between an ageing gangster John who cheats his sidekick Surya by tricking him to go to jail. Will Surya kill John or succumb to the gang after coming out of prison???

title: Guna 369
synopsis: Guna (Karthikeya) is a happy-go-lucky guy who believes the solution to solving issues is not through violence but through compromise. But what happens when he's forced to the extremes by someone close to him?

title: Happy Journey
synopsis: Five strangers opt for carpooling journey from Hyderabad to Bangalore. Happy, an orphan girl is a Blog writer by profession, who is suffering from weird dreams, the doctor suggests to cut down her stress,

title: Hey Krishna
synopsis: Hey Krishna, is the story of a 25-year-old engineering graduate, who leads a boring life and fails miserably in all his efforts, each time he decides to woo a lady. After a series of unfortunate (and comical) incidents the protagonist is convinced that Lord Krishna is the root cause of all his sufferings and a love life that's completely missing in action. What follows is a dramatic decision which would change his life forever.

title: Heza
synopsis: A musician and his wife are haunted by an evil eye hex witch who tries to find her source for mortal life through them. The protagonist slums into unrest to escape from the demonic witch's grave peal.

title: Hippi
synopsis: Hippi is about the live-in relationship between an energetic youngster and a confident girl.

title: I Love You
synopsis: Santhosh is a top businessman, who is married to a dutiful wife Gowri as per his father's last wishes. He has a daughter too, but has zero interest in his domestic life. Instead, he is still in love with his college sweetheart Dharmika. What happens when he gets a chance to meet her once again after years ?

title: Iddari Lokam Okate
synopsis: A series of coincidences brings two star-crossed lovers together, but fate pulls them apart until they encounter each other again in Hyderabad.

title: iSmart Shankar
synopsis: A contract killer escapes after murdering a politician and must help the cops find a murderer after a slain officer's memories are transferred to his brain.

title: Jersey
synopsis: A failed cricketer decides to revive his cricketing career in his late 30's despite everyone being skeptical of his ability to do so.

title: Jessie
synopsis: Set in an abandoned house, the film follows a team of professional ghost hunters trying to conduct a paranormal investigation to unveil the mystery of two sisters, Jessie and Amy, where Amy shows unusual mental and physical behaviour.

title: Jodi
synopsis: Kapil (Aadi Saikumar) falls for Kanchana Mala (Shraddha Srinath) because of her ideals. But what happens when Kapil's father's (Naresh) ideals cause issues for them?

title: June
synopsis: The life story of a girl named June from 16 years of her age until she turned 26, thereby giving an insight into those ten years of her life.

title: Kaappaan
synopsis: A Special Protection Group officer has to identify the threat to the prime minister, who he is protecting, and also the nation.

title: Kadaram Kondan
synopsis: Vasu, a young medico, after rescuing one of his patients from a murder attempt finds out that his pregnant wife is abducted, and the kidnappers demand the patient he saved in exchange for her safety.

title: Kalava..? Cheliya..!
synopsis: "KALAVA..? CHELIYA..!" Is an emotional love drama which shows the true feelings of guy named Sanju towards thanmayee who is his best friend from years, he proposed her on her pre wedding day, and she politely refused him and said him that we are just friends, then what will he do next either move on with his goals or end up his life? , Those points or potraied with heart touching dailouges,soulful music and Good camera work. Please do watch it.

title: Kalki
synopsis: The village of Kollapuram is under the rule of Narsappa (Ashutosh Rana) and Perumal (Shatru). One day during a local festival Sekhar (Siddhu Jonnalagadda), brother of Narsappa gets killed. Kalki (Rajasekhar) is appointed as the investigation officer. Who is behind the murder of Sekhar Babu and how Does Kalki conclude the mystery is what the movie is all about?

title: Kanchana 3
synopsis: A young man who gets easily scared is possessed by a ghost that is seeking revenge.

title: Kanneeti Katthi
synopsis: A vengeful farmer's encounter with a little girl changes his life forever

title: Kathanam
synopsis: Anu (Anasuya Kasaba) an aspiring director develops a script on a producer's request. Twist in the tale arises when the murders scripted in the story start happening in real life. The parallel story is crux of Kathanam.

title: Kee
synopsis: A man falls in love with a girl and tries to impress her. However, their life takes a serious turn when they fall victim to cyber-bullying.

title: Kerala megafloods
synopsis: The Kerala floods of 2018 were one of the most devastating floods in India. Did climate change cause them? Or was it something else? Journalist Niret Alva on this journey as he tries to find the truth.

title: Khananam
synopsis: It follows the story of Ajay, a celebrated architect who loses it all and subsequently sets on a path of vengeance and redemption.

title: Kiss
synopsis: Nandini (Sreeleela) is a young, carefree college student, whose motto in life is to enjoy herself, so much so that she is often suspended from class for daydreaming. She then chances upon Arjun (Viraat), when she manages to accidentally damage his car. When Arjun demands that she compensates him for the damage, she offers to work for him as his assistant, to avoid informing her parents and facing their wrath. They strike a deal for Nandini to work with him for 72 days, a time in which she begins to have feelings for him, but is not able to broach the subject with him. As it turns out, Arjun also realizes that he misses Nandini and decides to follow her all the way to Madikeri to woo her. Strangely enough, she rejects his proposals. Why, though?

title: Kobbari Matta
synopsis: Kobbarimatta is a Comedy Spoof Telugu Film. Pedharayudu (Sampoornesh) is a village headman. He got misunderstandings with his Son Androidu and other family members. How they solved those problems and united is rest of the story.

title: Kothaga Maa Prayanam
synopsis: Kothaga Maa Prayanam is about Karthik "Priyanth" who is a playboy and doesn't believe in marriage and love. He proposes Keerthi "Yamini Bhaskar", a new employee at his office to start a live in relationship. Keerthi, who also likes him agrees on the condition that he stops his playboy ways. Things go wrong between them when Keerthi catches him with another girl.

title: Kousalya Krishnamurthy
synopsis: Kousalya Murugesan, the daughter of Murugesan, a farmer, aspires to become an international cricketer so that she can put a smile on her cricket-loving father's face by helping the country win.

title: Krishna Rao Supermarket
synopsis: Krishna Rao Supermarket is a Telugu movie starring Kriishna and Elsa Ghosh in prominent roles. It is a drama directed by Sreenath Pulakuram, with Bhole Shavali as the musician, forming part of the crew.

title: Lakshmi's NTR
synopsis: Lakshmi's NTR is all about the Former Chief Minister "Nandamuri Taraka Ramarao" life after entering into the politics and about why and how he married "Lakshmi Parvathi" and how she played an important role in NTR's life makes the plot of the story.

title: Lingababu & Co - Mitradrohi
synopsis: Lingababu gets irritated with Raghavendra's phone calls.

title: Lingababu & Co - The Hitopadesham
synopsis: A confused student meets Lingababu for career guidance.

title: Lingababu ki Horror Prem Kahani
synopsis: Lingababu and Raghavendra gets haunted by a mysterious ghost in their rented house.

title: Madhaveeyam
synopsis: Madhav and Mallika grow fond of each other, fall in love and get married. Things take a setback when the couple meets with an accident and their life changes forever.

title: Maharshi
synopsis: A story about Rishi and his quest for success in different stages of life from being a US-based businessman to being a champion for the poor downtrodden farmers.

title: Majili
synopsis: After being abandoned by his lover, Anshu, Poorna takes to alcohol and is forced to marry his neighbour, Sravani. However, he soon discovers her unrequited love for him and falls for her.

title: Mallesham
synopsis: The life of Padma Shri winner Chintakindi Mallesham, who invented the ASU machine that processes yarn for sarees mechanically, is being recreated in this biopic.

title: Malli Malli Chusa
synopsis: Gautham is an orphan raised by an Army major in Vizag. Swapna is a college student from Hyderabad who loses the diary that Gautham finds. How he manages to impress her forms the rest of the tale.

title: Manasupalike Mounaragam
synopsis: What happened when she found out that the boy she was chasing and loving was dumb?

title: Manmadhudu 2
synopsis: Under pressure to marry, a perennial bachelor hires a much younger woman to act as his fiancée, but her bond with his family throws his plan for a loop.

title: Maro Adugu Marpu Kosam
synopsis: "Maro Adugu Maarpu Kosam" U Story, Dialogues, Screen play, Producer & Directer Inavolu Prasanna kumar under the Banner of Mitas Visions is a Social awareness message oriented film. This movie portrays national integrity and is not about a particular Caste , Religion and Political party. This film emphasises that every poor person should get an opportunity to get educated as everyone has individual capacities. Our country should be free from Caste and Religion system and everyone should live united. It also emphasises on the necessity and Importance of Citizenship Bill introduced by Central Government. It also tells about the necessary steps to be taken to control pollution menace in our country. It explains the benefits of Demonetisation, One Nation -One Identity Card. The concept of the film which was clearly deliverd by me as a non stop dialogue in 15min 15 sec and I have won place in Wonder Book of records and Telugu Book of Records. This movie has been given "U" certificate by the Censor Board and was released on March 8th 2019 in Telangana and Andhra states. This film has won Bharat Kala Ratna award given by ABC Foundation , Bharat Kala Samithi and Telangana Government. It has won Dr.Dasari Excellence Director Award from Dr.Dasari Films Award and also Social Harmony Award for making Message Oriented film from V.B Entertainment Bullithera awards and recently received Social Harmony films merit certificate award Maro Aduge Maarpu Kosam on the occation of Republic Day 26th Jan 2020 by Collector & District Magistrate Sri V. Vinay Chand IAS Visakhapatnam Andhra Pradesh.

title: Marshal
synopsis: Marshal is a medical crime thriller movie directed by Jai Raaja Singh and produced by Abhay Adaka. The movie cast includes Srikanth, Abhay, Megha Chowdhury and Rashmi are in the lead roles. Yaadagiri Varikuppala scored music.

title: Mathu Vadalara
synopsis: Simha is a courier delivery boy who gets peanuts as salary despite putting in a lot of hard work. As Babu gets frustrated with his job, his friend and roommate Satya shows him how to get 'tips' from the greedy customer. Babu is reluctant, but tries to pull it off and his very first attempt goes awry. He is now left in a deep mess and needs to clean it up as soon as possible. But little does he know that what awaits on the other side.

title: Meeku Maathrame Chepta
synopsis: Rakesh, in an effort to woo his fiance, has promised her that he is a teetotaler. But when a compromising video of his leaks just two days before his wedding, all hell breaks loose.

title: Mei
synopsis: The missing case of a young girl unfolds several hidden crimes related to a medical racket as investigation progresses.

title: Miracle
synopsis: Movie story starts from the end of Veerappan , what if Veerapan comes back in disguise of an IPS officer. Can any man die twice in his life. Celebrity couple Mrs Lilitha and Harman shergill serve as IAS and IPS respectively. On a felicitation function where all the police official and judges and VIPS and the press are present Lilitha kills her husband Harman Shergill on the dias and now why she did that and how she is not proven guilty in the court of law is plot of the story.

title: Mismatch
synopsis: Siddhu is a genius boy right from his childhood. He has terrific memory power and even enters the Gunnies book of World Records. On the other hand, Kanaka Mahalakshmi's only dream is to win a gold for the country in the sport of wrestling.love with each and also see crazy problems in their life. What happened to each one's goals and a love story? To know this, you have to watch the film.

title: Mithai
synopsis: After getting fired from his boring job Sai who is to get married in three days time, goes drinking with his friend Jani, his house gets robbed. Sai loses everything including the diamond necklace later in the evening he gets into a stupid challenge with his NRI friend Krishna. Sai and Jani take up the challenge that Sai wont get married until they find the thief. Their mad caper begins when they meet up dude, a pot-smoking slacker loafing aimlessly with his pet goat. They are running against time and desperate, with just three days for Sai to get married. In this journey of self-exploration, they are neck deep in trouble. Will they find what they are looking for? Only time will tell.

title: Mouname Ishtam
synopsis: This is a coming age love story that follows the protagonist, Varun from his village to the city where he falls in love with an independent city born a girl Maya.

title: Mr. Majnu
synopsis: A charming playboy who has never had a serious relationship finds himself in a spot of bother when he finally meets the right girl. Will they end up together? Or will his fear of commitment affect their relationship?

title: Naa Katha Vintaara?
synopsis: An alcoholic teenager confesses his life events in an open mic event and his perspective on many other perspectives of people on his father's demise

title: Nedunalvaadai
synopsis: An unemployed youngster is at the crossroads, puzzled about choosing between family and love.

title: Nee Kosam
synopsis: The protagonist (Aravind Reddy) goes searching for an unknown person (Ajit Radharam) from a diary that he finds at an accident. Both have parallel love stories with a murky past.

title: Neethone Yeppatiki
synopsis: After living together with Jaanu for some time, Sid wishes and celebrates her birthday in a very special way. Sid promises jaanu to be with jaanu forever. Will, he able to keep up his promise. Who comes in between.

title: Nene Kedi No. 1
synopsis: Jackie is a roadside Romeo who misses the love and care of his parents. And he gets into a wrong path. This is also the same time when yet another Shankar is brought into the picture. The rest is story.

title: Nene mukyamantri
synopsis: The movie will begin with a bump in the court of Chief Minister who rules the state politics. The current chief minister can not help him, but he does not want to help a star hero when he accidentally dies, and then the younger son will not be the chief minister, and the party that he does not like is the CBI ink.

title: Nenu Lenu
synopsis: Nenu Lenu is the story of Eeshwar (Harshit), an orphan who falls for Parvati's (Sri Padma) honesty in the first sight and convinces her to marry him after much effort. In time, a gang of goons hunt for him and take him away. Later, news comes out that Eeshwar killed three of them and one is missing. Cops find Eeshwar under mysterious circumstances and are shocked when he claims to be already dead.

title: Ninnu Thalachi
synopsis: Abhiram (Vamsi Yakasiri) is a happy-go-lucky guy, who falls in love at first sight with a girl named Ankitha tries very hard to explain his feeling to her. On the other hand, she loves someone who doesn't guarantee their relationship is meant to be. Things upside-down when Abhi knows the truth. It is now up to Abhi to convince Ankitha to change her mind. Will Ankitha change her mind? Will they reunite? And how this can lead to their lasting relationship?

title: Ninnu Veedani Needanu Nene
synopsis: Ninu Veedani Needanu Nene is about a young man who gets mired in a dire situation and comes out successfully.

title: NTR Kathanayakudu
synopsis: Based on the journey of the legendary Telugu actor, filmmaker and ex-Chief Minister Late Taraka Rama Rao Nandamuri.

title: NTR: Mahanayakudu
synopsis: A follow up to NTR: Kathanayakudu which was based on N.T. Rama Rao's life and acting career. This movie will focus on his political career.

title: Nuvvu Thopu Raa
synopsis: A young Indian immigrant moves to the US to spite his family. While there, he falls on hard times and learns the importance of hard-work, planning, generosity, and family.

title: Oh Baby
synopsis: A 70-year-old woman is given a second chance to relive her youth when she turns into a 24-year-old girl.

title: Oka Tupaki Moodu Pittalu
synopsis: Oka Tupaki Moodu Pittalu is a Telugu movie starring Dharmavarapu Subramanyam, Aarthi Agarwal and L. B. Sriram in prominent roles. It is a romantic comedy movie directed by Ramkumar, with Vandemataram Srinivas as the music director, forming part of the crew.

title: Okate Life
synopsis: Ram has found a novel way to make some quick bucks: setting up an agency which helps out people who are facing issues in their relationship. However, his career as a love doctor and matchmaker is about to face its greatest challenge when a couple he brought together get into some serious trouble.

title: Oorantha Anukuntunnaru
synopsis: Gowri and Mahesh are childhood friends with no intention to marry each other. However, as per the village customs, they are meant to be a 'perfect couple'. Things turn around when certain twists are brought up during the process of engaging the couple. Do the villagers convince the duo to stay together or not?

title: Operation Gold Fish
synopsis: A group of commandos set out on a mission to find and eliminate a mysterious terrorist mastermind called Gold Fish in the Kashmir valley.

title: Pandu Gadi Photo Studio
synopsis: Pandugadu(Ali) is a crazy photographer. Whenever he takes photos of unmarried people, they get hitched very soon. On the other hand, there is a village Yetimuka where none of the youth is getting hitched.

title: Peru leni Manishi (Man with no name)
Pichhodu
synopsis: A heartfelt story about soulmates. The film revolves around Rishi, who is on the search for true love. Protagonist Rishi lost his mother when he was a kid. She committed suicide due to his husband's harassment. Rishi thought that their parents were not soulmates and his grandparents also made him believe that there weren't. After growing up, he started looking for the right person with whom he feels that he would be trusted wholeheartedly, respected and cared for deeply.

title: Pink Lady
synopsis: All drinks have stories within them. The best ones carry secrets. The pink lady is the cocktail of a mysterious stranger, an old bartender, his disciple and an unsolved murder, served with a unique twist.

title: Prati Roju Pandaage
synopsis: With only a few weeks left to live, an aging grandfather is visited by his grandson who wishes to fulfill his desires.

title: Prema Antha Easy Kadu
synopsis: Karthik (Rajesh Kumar) fell in love with Prema(Prajwal Poovaiah) from his childhood. But for some unforeseen circumstances, Karthik got banished from the village and his father was forced to take care of her for certain time. Few years later, Karthik returned to the village and asked her to love him. But she refuses to love him. Karthik is adamant to find out what is the obstacle that is separating them.

title: Prema Katha Chithram 2
synopsis: Her unrequited love for a college mate leads a young woman to take her own life. Things take a dark turn when her spirit returns to haunt those who had caused her heartbreak.

title: Prema katha Chitram 2
synopsis: Bindu (Siddhi Idnani) is head over heels for Sudheer (Sumanth Ashwin) but he falls for another girl Nandu (Nandita Swetha). Bindu who is unable to bear that commits suicide. Her spirit possesses Nandu and gives a hard time to Sudheer and his friends. How Sudheer drives the spirit away from Nandu's body and saves her life is the rest of the story of Prema Kadha Chitram 2.

title: Raghupathi Venkaiah Naidu
synopsis: Raghupathi Venkaiah Naidu (Naresh), born in the year 1887 at Machilipatnam of AP, is widely regarded as father of Telugu Cinema and is an art enthusiast from an early age. He travels to Madras to pursue photography and what turns him into a pioneer of Telugu cinema is what the story is all about.

title: Rahasyam
synopsis: It is about an aspiring director who gets a chance of making his first horror thriller. In order to make one, he decides to know more about evil spirits. In a sudden turn of events there, an evil spirit called Divya (Rithika) starts chasing him and forces Ravi to cast her as the heroine of the film.

title: Raja Vaaru Rani Gaaru
synopsis: Raja Vaaru Rani Gaaru is the story of Raju who falls in love with Rani but is unable to express his emotions. Set in a beautiful village, watch as Raju and two of his friends deal with the toils and troubles of romance.

title: Rajdooth
synopsis: A 25-year-old rouge's quest for an old Rajdooth bike. He, along with his friend backtrack the lost bike from Pochampally to Khammam to various other places in Andhra Pradesh and in the process realize their responsibilities and nitty-gritties of living a life.

title: Raju Gari Gadhi 3
synopsis: An unknown spirit guards Maya against any possible threats from eve-teasers and Don Juans. But what happens when true love flourishes between Maya and Ashwin Babu, and the spirit isn't all too happy about it?

title: Rakshasudu
synopsis: Arun, a newly recruited sub-inspector, sets out in pursuit of a mysterious serial killer who targets teen girls and murders them brutally. His hunt for the psychopath will come at a price, but nothing will stop Arun from ending the killer's vicious murder spree.

title: Rama Chakkani Seetha
synopsis: Rama Chakkani Seetha tells the story of Balu and Anu, and how they fall for each other.

title: Ranarangam
synopsis: Deva "Sharwanand" is an ambitious guy who doesn't mind taking an illegal route to earning money. He stars bootlegging liquor during the prohibition era. In doing so, he finds himself to be at the wrong side local MLA Simhachalam "Murali Sharma". While all this is happening, Deva also falls in love with Geetha "Kalyani Priyadarshan". How Deva becomes a big gangster who operates from a foreign location? Where is Geetha, and what do his foes do, is what the movie is all about?

title: Rangupaduddi
synopsis: Six people. One haunted bungalow. A long night of terrors. Will they succeed or succumb?

title: Rayalaseema Love Story
synopsis: Rayalaseema Love Story is a thrilling combination of romance and action directed by Ram Ranadheer.

title: RDX Love
synopsis: RDX Love talks about Alivelu (Payal) who takes charge of a village and solves their issues against all odds.

title: R.I.P - Rage in Progress
synopsis: Sudheer is forced to join his evil friend to make a living, it becomes too late before he corrects himself.

title: Romantic Criminals
synopsis: Habituated to drugs, a young couple commits various crimes with the help of a drug peddler. One fine day, they decide to stop all the crimes and settle down in life. Will they be able to come out of the crime world easily

title: Ruler
synopsis: A businesswoman adopts a stranger who saves her life and raises him as her son. However, the man has a dark past that catches up with him despite his mother's attempts to shield him from it.

title: Saaho
synopsis: A man uses an arsenal of weapons to battle a gang of heavily armed thugs in the city. With the city under fire and people's lives at risk, the one man has to give everything he has got to take the city back.

title: Safe
synopsis: Shreya opens a Pandora's box of sexual abuse cases that point to a high profile celebrity. Amidst rising crime and violence, Arundhati, a Social Activist starts a public movement called SAFE to protect women, children and the aged.

title: Sakala Kala Vallabhudu
synopsis: Srinu is a happy go lucky village youth who falls in love with Chaitra. Things become difficult for Srinu when he finds out that Lilly, who doesn't like him, happens to be Chaitra's best friend. Despite Srinu's many careful attempts to woo Chaitra, Lilly keeps creating problems for him. Just when Chaitra starts getting feelings for Srinu, something unexpected happens.

title: Samaram
synopsis: The movie setting is based on a true story. a back drop of suspense, crime and lust. The movie focuses on sexual harassment of working women. This movie is thoroughly gripping, heart stopping, action packed thriller and most importantly adresses the core issue of sexual harassment of women. Fresh, young and energetic casts bring life and emotion into the movie with never a dull moment.

title: Sambhavami yuge yuge
synopsis: The plot of this short film revolves around a line from the Bhagavad Gita: "sambhavami yuge yuge," where the lead character fails his sister as his blood relative and seeks redemption, for his mistakes. And also mentions of diverse topics such as work investment and social justice issues.

title: Sandhyavela
synopsis: Lakshmi and Krishna are siblings who have made an arrangement of taking care of their bedridden Mother alternatively. one day this mundanity perpetrates Lakshmi to take her an action which coincides with Krishna's arrival leaving Lakshmi in deep guilt and fear.

title: Seven
synopsis: A police officer is bewildered by conflicting statements about Karthik's identity. Several young women seem to share a mysterious connection with him. An old man claims to know Karthik as Krishnamurthy, who died thirty years ago.

title: Sita
synopsis: A four-year-old Ram is left in a monastery by a person named Anand Mohan and is promised that Sita will come to take care of him. Ram is innocent and cute. He makes Ram promise that he too, will take care of Sita in return. However, after 20 years of waiting, when Sita finally meets Ram, she is far from good intentions towards Ram and is only after the 5000 crore estate. The plot revolves around the final fate of Ram and Sita in light of these discoveries.

title: Sivappu Manjal Pachai
synopsis: Rajashekar is a strict traffic police officer whose marriage is arranged with Madhan's sister. However, Madhan, an arrogant street racer, cannot forgive Rajashekar for humiliating him in the past.

title: Sivaranjani
synopsis: Karthik (Nandu) is a Creative Director and Chairman of U and I advertising Agency. When he is coming back from work his car become break down in midnight due to less coolant. While searching for the water he found a girl (Rashmi Gautam) in water pond. Karthik joined her in Hospital. She gets cured but lost her memory. Since her memory loss she forgot her name, and then Karthik named her as Madhu. Frequently few unknown recollections are bothering her intense. Karthik took her to a place where his brother and sister-in-law stay along with him. Sivaranjani have been saved from Durga Bhai (Delhi Rajeswari) and Malhotra's (Rajendra) magical powers. Karthik and Madhu were in deep love and they tend to get marry soon. All of a sudden, a stranger name called Rishi came to Madhu and revealed that she is his wife and her name is Sivaranjani. In the mean time Madhu had a doubt on him. Madhu alias Sivaranjani fiercely shifted to Rishi's house with some evidences shown by Rishi. But still unknown recollections are influencing her to found some hidden facts. In that process she found wrist watch with blood stains in Rishi's car back side of the trunk. When she questioned Rishi, he told that "you had an illegal affair with my partner kaushik (Indra) who came from US. You killed koushik because of his cheating attitude. When I have tried to save you, I took out his body and burnt him in the city outskirts.. May be during that time my watch might have fallen in that place". Do you think.. Sivaranjani is a culprit? - Why unknown recollections are bothering her quite often?? What was the hidden truth???

title: Sixer
synopsis: A site engineer, who suffers from night blindness, gets into trouble when he is mistaken for the leader of a protest group by a goon. His life becomes even more complicated after he falls in love.

title: Software Sudheer
synopsis: Chandu and Swathi are Software engineers. Chandu is an average guy who never misses an opportunity to impress Swathi. Once Swathi recognizes Chandu's honesty and innocence, the affair begins. Suddenly they find themselves stuck in a major problem. Can Chandu save Swathi?

title: Special
synopsis: A suspended police officer sets out to investigate a medico with mind-reading abilities, and a cat-and-mouse game ensues between the two. Directed by Vastav, the film stars Ajay, Ranga and Akshata in the lead roles.

title: Srujana and coffee
synopsis: "Two coffee addicts find love in their shared obsession. But as their bond grows, they wonder-can a shared habit fuel a deeper connection? This is a story where caffeine isn't the only thing they crave."

title: Stalker
synopsis: An actress goes to an audition and finds the director very intimidating. Soon she realizes that someone is stalking her leading to a run for life.

title: Super Duper
synopsis: Two petty criminals end up kidnapping the wrong woman, and end up in a situation where they have to deal with a kingpin of a drug mafia.

title: Suryakantham
synopsis: Suryakantam is the story of an eccentric girl who turns everyone's worlds upside down.

title: Swayamvada
synopsis: Swayamvada is a psychological thriller centered on a rare disease which inflicts pain not only on the affected, but also the family members of the affected. The movie explores the love of nature, the tender feelings of companionship in a relationship between a man and a woman and the extent to which a woman goes if she suffers betrayal at the hands of her lover.

title: Sye Raa Narasimha Reddy
synopsis: A historical action epic inspired by the life of Uyyalawada Narasimha Reddy, who revolted against the atrocities of East India Company 10 years before the Sepoy Mutiny.

title: Telisi Teliyaka
synopsis: "Misunderstandings spark a major conflict between a couple. How they resolve it and what they realize about each other forms the heart of the story."

title: Tenali Ramakrishna BA.BL
synopsis: Tenali ramakrishna is an aspiring lawyer who looks for a life changing case take up in his career. He falls in love with Rukmini "Hansika Motwani". She is daughter of chakravarthi "Murali sharma". Chakravarthi is a well known criminal lawyer who takes up a murder case of Varalakshmi, instead of defending varalakshmi he joins hands with the opposition and conspires to convict her. Tenali finds out about this conspiracy and rest of movie is all about how he gets Varalakshmi out of the case.

title: Thipparaa Meesam
synopsis: An extremely talented DJ working in a local night pub, who is also a spoiled brat, gets involved in an adventure where he must fight against all odds to survive.

title: Tholubommalata
synopsis: Sodala Raju wanted to get his grand-nephew and grand-niece married, but when Raju dies, how the marriage will work forms the crux of the story.

title: Thota, Shadow behind the canvas...
synopsis: 'Thota' explores the struggles, aspirations, confusions, pretensions, the communist influences and ultimately the journey of becoming the renowned artist Thota Vaikuntam. Though disillusioned with communist leaders he believes that communism would build a peaceful society with a humanistic approach. At this last phase of life, he desires to escape the 'inhuman multi-layered urbanized life' and reach his village roots. This documentary 'Thota' follows the journey of a young boy, Thota Vaikuntam from an underprivileged village which ends up in the modern flashy yet historical city of Hyderabad and the transformation of the small boy into a fully bloomed artist. 'Thota' breaks down Thota Vaikuntam's life into different stratas revealing all the shades of his life.

title: Three Drops of Life
synopsis: The son of a farmer who is influenced by his simple father realizes the importance of water, education and saving a life over a period of time.

title: Thupaki Ramudu
synopsis: Ramudu is a free-spirited, illiterate orphan from a village. Priya is a well-educated woman who runs a book store in the same village. What makes them fall in love and how they manage to face the odds that come along with it.

title: Tingarabuchi
synopsis: "A confused girl meets an intelligent guy, leading to chaotic flirting and comic misunderstandings. A tale of mixed signals and unexpected sparks."

title: Undiporaadhey
synopsis: This is a periodical love story based on real-life true events happened during the 1980s. The film revolves around a girl and a boy who meet at college admissions after that their love blossom at that point the story takes a real turn and their life becomes up and down.

title: Vanam
synopsis: A team of archaeology students head to a forest in search of fabled diamonds, but once there, the treasure hunt turns into a struggle for survival

title: Venky Mama
synopsis: A story of nephew and a son which revolves around their emotions and village drama and army based story.

title: Vinara sodara veera kumara
synopsis: Ramana falls in love with Sulochana but their relationship fails to materialize due to which he decides to end his life. He then meets a soul that communicates with him to make him realize the importance of life over love.

title: Vinaya Vidheya Rama
synopsis: When the happiness of his family is held to ransom by a violent crime lord, Ram sets out on a quest to destroy his nemesis and his criminal empire.

title: Viswamitra
synopsis: It is based on true incidents which occurred in a church in New Zealand and America. It revolves around a woman who works in a software company and is averse to men.

title: Voter
synopsis: Gautam is an NRI who returns to India to cast his vote. When challenged by the woman he loves, Bhavana , to make a politician fulfill his campaign promises if he wants to win her over, Gautam sets off on a path to change the system.

title: Where Is the Venkatalakshmi
synopsis: Set in a remote village the film revolves around the story of four characters that unfolds with the arrival of Venkatalakshmi as the new school teacher.

title: Who
synopsis: Mahesh wants to enjoy with his friends for this weekend, but to his shock, police accuse him of a murder. Mahesh and his friend somehow manages to escape from the police and now they are confused about what they have to do get out of this case. How he able find out the real murderer makes up the rest of this action packed story.

title: Wife, i
synopsis: I lost my wife. Who is responsible?

title: Yedu Chepala Katha
synopsis: Ravi has weakness for women and gets into a physical relationship with ladies. One day, he falls in love with Bhavana. He has a heath issue, which requires blood. Why is he in a relationship with many women and what will happen to his love

title: Yemaya Jaruguthundho
synopsis: "A woman, on the verge of marriage, confesses her love to her best friend. His reaction and feelings unfold, exploring the complexities of love, friendship, and timing. Their story reveals the heart's deepest truths."

title: Your's Truly Samyra
synopsis: A short film based on parallel universe and quantum entanglement among drug addicted couples.
